arts.ttl: FA reveal Sheffield United charges after Chris Wilder shows true colours in Leeds United race
arts.sum: The FA have confirmed that they have charged Leeds United ’s promotion rivals Sheffield United with misconduct following a clash after the Championship game against Plymouth Argyle. The incident started when Sheffield United boss Chris Wilder approached Plymouth players Mustapha Bundu and Darko Gyabi as they walked down the tunnel.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Should Farke have control of transfers?
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be interested in signing Borussia Monchengladbach captain Julian Weigl, a link that looks very likely to be headed up by Daniel Farke’s previous work with the German midfielder. Leeds United reportedly interested in Borussia Dortmund midfielder Julian Weigl – Sky Sports

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s Most Controversial Moments in History
arts.sum: At the turn of the millennium, chairman Peter Ridsdale famously “lived the dream,” spending heavily to turn Leeds into a European powerhouse as the club made it to the semi-finals of the UEFA Cup and then the semis of the Champions League in the year after. A dark chapter for the club off the field: midfielder Lee Bowyer and defender Jonathan Woodgate were favourites of the club for their brilliance on the pitch, but were involved in a high-profile court case following an attack on Sarfraz Najeib, a student outside a nightclub in Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Oxford United
arts.sum: Leeds United travel down to Oxford United on Good Friday evening looking to move closer to automatic promotion with a victory. Leeds United team news pre-Oxford United: Dan James “late decision”

arts.ttl: Leeds United told to avoid £45m transfer 'gamble' after West Ham struggles
arts.sum: "A £45 million price tag could be a bit of a gamble for a club that’s being promoted into the Premier League, rather than a more established striker who knows where the back of the net is. Brighton and Hove Albion striker Evan Ferguson is said to be a player on United's radar .

arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt's permanent purchase of Danish fullback Rasmus Kristensen from Leeds United has been officially confirmed.
